title: scTHS-seq Protocol for Transposon Sequencing
author: Kun Zhang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xf8fjrw

steps.title: Generate 384 annealed transposons 7 µL,...
steps.instruction: Generate 384 annealed transposons 7 µL, Indexed Tn5 top strand (100uM) 7 µL, 5' phosphorylated mosaic end sequence bottom strand (100uM) Combine top and bottom strand oligos in a PCR tube. In a thermocycler, incubate for 2 minutes at 95 °C then ramp to 14 °C at a rate of -0.1 °C per second.

steps.title: Load Tn5-059 1 µL, 4
steps.instruction: Load Tn5-059 1 µL, 4.8 uM transposase Tn5-059 1 µL, diluted annealed transposons (6.5 uM)

steps.title: Wash nuclei or cells suspension with ice-cold PBS
steps.instruction: Wash nuclei or cells suspension with ice-cold PBS

steps.title: Resuspend 400,000 cells/nuclei in lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend 400,000 cells/nuclei in lysis buffer. Use 100 uL per 100,000 cells/nuclei

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei in 100 uL 1
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei in 100 uL 1.5X D6 buffer initially. Count and add more 1.5X D6 buffer to create ~250 nuclei/uL

steps.title: Aliquot 4
steps.instruction: Aliquot 4.0 uL of cells in 1.5X D6 buffer into wells containing 2.0 uL of prepared transposomes

steps.title: Incubation without shaking 37 °C, Thermocycler 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubation without shaking 37 °C, Thermocycler 00:30:00

steps.title: Terminate the tagmentation reaction with EDTA...
steps.instruction: Terminate the tagmentation reaction with EDTA 4 µL, EDTA, 50 mM

steps.title: Store cells at -20C overnight or until ready to sort
steps.instruction: Store cells at -20C overnight or until ready to sort

steps.title: Coat 12 x 200 uL, 1...
steps.instruction: Coat 12 x 200 uL, 1 x 15 mL conical using 1X FACS buffer 01:00:00, Let tubes sit in FACS buffer

steps.title: Add 1 volume (10 uL) ice...
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume (10 uL) ice cold 2X FACS buffer to each sample well with cells in tagmentation mix

steps.title: Make 1000 uL transposase dilution buffer 667 µL, 75% glycerol/0
steps.instruction: Make 1000 uL transposase dilution buffer 667 µL, 75% glycerol/0.3% TritonX-100 1 µL, DTT, 1M 6.25 µL, Tris-HCl, 4M, pH 7.5 325.75 µL, nuclease free water

steps.title: Make 10 mL 75% glycerol with 0
steps.instruction: Make 10 mL 75% glycerol with 0.3% tritonX-100 9.45 g, Glycerol (100%) 300 µL, TritonX-100, 10% 2200 µL, nuclease free water

steps.title: Make 10 mL of 1
steps.instruction: Make 10 mL of 1.5X D6 buffer 1500 µL, Tango Buffer, 10X 2400 µL, DMF, 100% 6100 µL, nuclease free water

steps.title: Make 10 mL of 1X lysis...
steps.instruction: Make 10 mL of 1X lysis buffer 25 µL, Tris-HCl, 4M, pH 7.5 20 µL, Sodium chloride, 5M 15 µL, Magnesium chloride, 2M 100 µL, IGEPAL-630, 10% 2000 µL, BSA, 10% 1000 µL, PBS, 10X 6840 µL, nuclease free water Finally, add 1 protease inhibitor tablet (EDTA-free).

steps.title: Make 10 mL of 2X FACS...
steps.instruction: Make 10 mL of 2X FACS buffer 1000 µL, PBS, 10X 2000 µL, BSA, 10% 80 µL, EDTA, 0.5M 6920 µL, nuclease free water

steps.title: Dilute annealed transposons 1 µL, Annealed transposons 6
steps.instruction: Dilute annealed transposons 1 µL, Annealed transposons 6.7 µL, transposon dilution buffer

steps.title: Make 420 uL of 4
steps.instruction: Make 420 uL of 4.8 uM transposase Tn5-059 252 µL, transposase, Tn5-059, 8 uM 168 µL, transposase dilution buffer

steps.title: Incubate 22 °C, Thermocycler 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 22 °C, Thermocycler 00:30:00

steps.title: Incubate 4 °C, On ice 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 4 °C, On ice 00:05:00

steps.title: Pellet by centrifuging at 900 RCF
steps.instruction: Pellet by centrifuging at 900 RCF

steps.title: Count cells
steps.instruction: Count cells

steps.title: Pellet 400,000 cells / nuclei by...
steps.instruction: Pellet 400,000 cells / nuclei by centrifuging at 330 RCF (cells) or 900 RCF (nuclei)

steps.title: Incubate 37 °C, Thermocycler 00:15:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 37 °C, Thermocycler 00:15:00

steps.title: When 15 mL conical have been...
steps.instruction: When 15 mL conical have been coated for 1 hr, pool all samples together using multichannel pipette and adding to 12 x 200 uL tubes

steps.title: Centrifuge at 500 RCF 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 500 RCF 4 °C

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei in 1
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei in 1.5 mL 1X FACS buffer

steps.title: Add stain for sorting 75 µL, Propidium Iodide
steps.instruction: Add stain for sorting 75 µL, Propidium Iodide

steps.title: Sort 100 cells into each well...
steps.instruction: Sort 100 cells into each well using BD Influx, remove doublets using forward and side scatter plots and selecting for PI-staining events

steps.title: Add 10 uL PBS to each...
steps.instruction: Add 10 uL PBS to each well of 10 to 15 x 96-wells plate for sorting Cover and store all plates on ice.

steps.title: Add 11 uL of 8M guanidine...
steps.instruction: Add 11 uL of 8M guanidine chloride to each well using multi-channel to lyse nuclei and release DNA 14 mL, Guanidine hydrochloride, 8M

steps.title: Add 30 uL of KAPA Pure...
steps.instruction: Add 30 uL of KAPA Pure Beads to each well to bind DNA 42.24 mL, KAPA Pure Beads KAPA Pure Beads (60 mL) Roche Catalog #07983298001

steps.title: Mix well and bind for at...
steps.instruction: Mix well and bind for at least 8 minutes 00:08:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Place plate on magnet for at...
steps.instruction: Place plate on magnet for at least 3 minutes then discard the supernatant 00:03:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution
steps.instruction: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution. Wash beads (while still on magnet) twice with 170 uL of 80% ethanol 384 mL, Freshly prepared 80% ethanol

steps.title: After last wash, completely remove all...
steps.instruction: After last wash, completely remove all ethanol and transfer to a heated thermomixer to dry 37 °C 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 8 uL of nuclease free...
steps.instruction: Add 8 uL of nuclease free water to each well using a multichannel pipette 8640 µL, nuclease-free water

steps.title: Add 2 uL of 5X Taq...
steps.instruction: Add 2 uL of 5X Taq Master Mix to perform gap filling 2160 µL, 5X Taq Master Mix Taq 5X Master Mix - 500 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0285L

steps.title: Incubate plates for gap filling 72 °C 00:08:00
steps.instruction: Incubate plates for gap filling 72 °C 00:08:00

steps.title: Add 2 uL of HiScribe T7...
steps.instruction: Add 2 uL of HiScribe T7 IVT reaction components to each well 2112 µL, T7 buffer, 10X 2112 µL, UTP 2112 µL, GTP 2112 µL, ATP 2112 µL, CTP 2112 µL, T7 RNA Polymerase

steps.title: Incubate 37 °C, Thermocycler 16:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 37 °C, Thermocycler 16:00:00

steps.title: Add 40 uL of KAPA Pure...
steps.instruction: Add 40 uL of KAPA Pure Beads to each well to bind DNA 42.24 mL, KAPA Pure Beads KAPA Pure Beads (60 mL) Roche Catalog #07983298001

steps.title: Mix well and bind for at...
steps.instruction: Mix well and bind for at least 8 minutes 00:08:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Place plate on magnet for at...
steps.instruction: Place plate on magnet for at least 3 minutes then discard the supernatant 00:03:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution
steps.instruction: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution. Wash beads (while still on magnet) twice with 170 uL of 80% ethanol 384 mL, Freshly prepared 80% ethanol

steps.title: After last wash, completely remove all...
steps.instruction: After last wash, completely remove all ethanol and transfer to a heated thermomixer to dry 37 °C 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 9 uL of nuclease free...
steps.instruction: Add 9 uL of nuclease free water to each well using a multichannel pipette 9720 µL, nuclease-free water

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 uL of random hexamers 3000 µL, random hexamers, 20 uM

steps.title: Incubate 70 °C, Thermocycler 00:03:00 Cool immediately on ice after
steps.instruction: Incubate 70 °C, Thermocycler 00:03:00 Cool immediately on ice after.

steps.title: Add 9
steps.instruction: Add 9.5 uL of MMLV RT mixture 4224 µL, First strand buffer, 5X 2112 µL, Advantage UltraPure dNTPs, 100 uM each 2112 µL, DTT, 100mM 528 µL, MMLV RT

steps.title: Incubate in a thermocycler 22 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermocycler 22 °C 00:10:00 42 °C 01:00:00 70 °C 00:10:00

steps.title: Add 1 uL RNase H 1127
steps.instruction: Add 1 uL RNase H 1127.52 µL, nuclease-free water 125.28 µL, RNase H, 5 Units/uL

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler 37 °C 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler 37 °C 00:20:00

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 uL second strand synthesis primer 3000 µL, sss_scnXTv2, 20 uM

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler 65 °C 00:02:00...
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler 65 °C 00:02:00 Cool immediately on ice after incubation

steps.title: Add 5
steps.instruction: Add 5.9 uL 5X Taq Master Mix 7363 µL, Taq Master Mix, 5X

steps.title: Incubate in thermocycler 72 °C 00:08:00
steps.instruction: Incubate in thermocycler 72 °C 00:08:00

steps.title: Add 40 uL of KAPA Pure...
steps.instruction: Add 40 uL of KAPA Pure Beads to each well to bind DNA 42.24 mL, KAPA Pure Beads KAPA Pure Beads (60 mL) Roche Catalog #07983298001

steps.title: Mix well and bind for at...
steps.instruction: Mix well and bind for at least 8 minutes 00:08:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Place plate on magnet for at...
steps.instruction: Place plate on magnet for at least 3 minutes then discard the supernatant 00:03:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution
steps.instruction: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution. Wash beads (while still on magnet) twice with 170 uL of 80% ethanol 384 mL, Freshly prepared 80% ethanol

steps.title: After last wash, completely remove all...
steps.instruction: After last wash, completely remove all ethanol and transfer to a heated thermomixer to dry 37 °C 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 4 uL of 1
steps.instruction: Add 4 uL of 1.5X tagmentation buffer to each well using a multichannel pipette 3172 µL, nuclease-free water 780 µL, Tango Buffer, 10X 1248 µL, DMF, 100%

steps.title: Generate annealed transposons 40 µL, i7...
steps.instruction: Generate annealed transposons 40 µL, i7 top strand (100uM) 40 µL, 5' phosphorylated mosaic end sequence bottom strand (100uM) Combine top and bottom strand oligos in a PCR tube. In a thermocycler, incubate for 2 minutes at 95 °C then ramp to 14 °C at a rate of -0.1 °C per second.

steps.title: Dilute annealed transposons 74 µL, Annealed...
steps.instruction: Dilute annealed transposons 74 µL, Annealed transposons 1026 µL, transposon dilution buffer

steps.title: Make 420 uL of 2
steps.instruction: Make 420 uL of 2.4 uM transposase Tn5-059 330 µL, transposase, Tn5-059, 8 uM 770 µL, transposase dilution buffer

steps.title: Load Tn5-059 1100 µL, 2
steps.instruction: Load Tn5-059 1100 µL, 2.4 uM transposase Tn5-059 1100 µL, diluted annealed transposons (6.5 uM)

steps.title: Incubate 22 °C, Thermocycler 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 22 °C, Thermocycler 00:30:00

steps.title: Add 2 uL of loaded transposomes to each well
steps.instruction: Add 2 uL of loaded transposomes to each well

steps.title: Incubate 55 °C, Thermocycler 00:06:00 Cool immediately on ice after
steps.instruction: Incubate 55 °C, Thermocycler 00:06:00 Cool immediately on ice after.

steps.title: Add 6 uL guanidine hydrochloride 7488 µL, Guanidine hydrochloride, 8M
steps.instruction: Add 6 uL guanidine hydrochloride 7488 µL, Guanidine hydrochloride, 8M

steps.title: Add 30 uL of KAPA Pure...
steps.instruction: Add 30 uL of KAPA Pure Beads to each well to bind DNA 31.68 mL, KAPA Pure Beads KAPA Pure Beads (60 mL) Roche Catalog #07983298001

steps.title: Mix well and bind for at...
steps.instruction: Mix well and bind for at least 8 minutes 00:08:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Place plate on magnet for at...
steps.instruction: Place plate on magnet for at least 3 minutes then discard the supernatant 00:03:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution
steps.instruction: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution. Wash beads (while still on magnet) twice with 170 uL of 80% ethanol 384 mL, Freshly prepared 80% ethanol

steps.title: After last wash, completely remove all...
steps.instruction: After last wash, completely remove all ethanol and transfer to a heated thermomixer to dry 37 °C 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 16 uL nuclease free water 21
steps.instruction: Add 16 uL nuclease free water 21.6 mL, nuclease-free water

steps.title: Make 3
steps.instruction: Make 3.045 mL transposons dilution buffer 2345 µL, 75% glycerol/0.3% TritonX-100 700 µL, Qiagen EB

steps.title: Preheat hotstart polymerase mix 250 µL,...
steps.instruction: Preheat hotstart polymerase mix 250 µL, KAPA HiFi Hotstart ReadyMix, 2X 98 °C, Thermocycler 00:00:45 Cool immediately on ice

steps.title: Add primers to make a master...
steps.instruction: Add primers to make a master mix to 417 nM final each 42 µL, i5XX, 5 uM 42 µL, i7XX, 5 uM

steps.title: Add SYBR Green for qPCR to 0
steps.instruction: Add SYBR Green for qPCR to 0.8X final 4 µL, SYBR Green, 100X

steps.title: Aliquot 8 uL of amplification mix...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 8 uL of amplification mix to each well to qPCR plate

steps.title: Sample 5 wells from each plate,...
steps.instruction: Sample 5 wells from each plate, adding 4 uL of each sample. Include an no nuclei control well.

steps.title: Perform qPCR
steps.instruction: Perform qPCR. Monitor the sample progress, terminate when all samples appears to be in exponential phase (usually 6-8 cycles). No nuclei control may appear to amplify but majority of those products are primer dimers. 1. 72C x 5 min 2. 98C x 30 s 3. 59C x 30 s 4. 72C x 1 min Plate read 5. Go to 2 for 20 cycles 6. 72C for 5 min

steps.title: Assess PCR products on a 6% TBE PAGE gel
steps.instruction: Assess PCR products on a 6% TBE PAGE gel. If lack of products, repeat test amplification on a different sampling of wells but adding 3-4 more cycles of amplification. If samples appear to be over-amplified, reduce the number of cycles by 1.

steps.title: Preheat hotstart polymerase mix 12000 µL,...
steps.instruction: Preheat hotstart polymerase mix 12000 µL, KAPA HiFi Hotstart ReadyMix, 2X 98 °C, Thermocycler 00:00:45 Cool immediately on ice

steps.title: Aliquot 12 uL of preheated KAPA...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 12 uL of preheated KAPA HiFi ReadyMix to each well of a new PCR plate

steps.title: Aliquot 2 uL of 16 different...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 2 uL of 16 different s5XX primers to each set of 2 plates (one per row) 150 µL, each s5XX primer, 5 uM

steps.title: Aliquot 2 uL of 12 different...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 2 uL of 12 different s7XX primers to each column of every plate (one per column) 100 µL, s7XX primer, 5 uM

steps.title: Transfer 8 uL of sample to...
steps.instruction: Transfer 8 uL of sample to each well of PCR plate

steps.title: Perform PCR using the number of...
steps.instruction: Perform PCR using the number of cycles determined previously with test PCR 1. 72C x 5 min 2. 98C x 30 s 3. 59C x 30 s 4. 72C x 1 min 5. Go to 2 for XX cycles 6. 72C for 5 min

steps.title: Pool 4 uL of each well...
steps.instruction: Pool 4 uL of each well from 2 plates with non-overlapping s5XX primers. Final volume is ~800 uL per pool. 5 pools total

steps.title: Add 800 uL of KAPA Pure...
steps.instruction: Add 800 uL of KAPA Pure Beads to each pool to bind DNA 3 mL, KAPA Pure Beads KAPA Pure Beads (60 mL) Roche Catalog #07983298001

steps.title: Mix well and bind for at...
steps.instruction: Mix well and bind for at least 8 minutes 00:08:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Place plate on magnet for at...
steps.instruction: Place plate on magnet for at least 3 minutes then discard the supernatant 00:03:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution
steps.instruction: Prepare fresh 80% ethanol solution. Wash beads (while still on magnet) twice with 1000 uL of 80% ethanol 12 mL, Freshly prepared 80% ethanol

steps.title: After last wash, completely remove all...
steps.instruction: After last wash, completely remove all ethanol and transfer to a heated thermomixer to dry 37 °C 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 20 uL of nuclease free...
steps.instruction: Add 20 uL of nuclease free water to each pool 100 µL, nuclease-free water

steps.title: Quantify each pool using dsDNA HS Qubit
steps.instruction: Quantify each pool using dsDNA HS Qubit

steps.title: Perform gel size selection for 220-1000...
steps.instruction: Perform gel size selection for 220-1000 bp using 6% TBE PAGE. Use 5-wells gel, and loading ~1 ug of library per well.
